description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 2 review/audit cluster. Pins cleanup APPLICATION apart from findings-only review, strategic analysis, and repo audit.

cases.prompt: Please de-tangle the checkout controller — flatten the nesting and kill the dead branches, behavior identical.
cases.reason: Explicit request to APPLY behavior-preserving edits to a named target — the side-effecting simplification job.

cases.prompt: Look over the diff in PR #77 and tell me what's wrong with it — don't change anything.
cases.reason: Findings report on a diff with no edits — reviewer territory.

cases.prompt: Why does every change to the checkout area take three sprints? Assess what's structurally wrong there and what it's costing us.
cases.reason: Strategic diagnosis connecting code state to delivery cost — analysis, not edits.

cases.prompt: Sweep the whole repo and tell me where the dead code, duplication, and dependency rot is concentrated.
cases.reason: Whole-repo inventory and findings — audit first; targeted simplification passes may follow per finding.
